video_details.title: A Holistic Lens for Optimal Health & Performance Featuring Dr. Daniel Chille
video_details.description:
I am beyond excited to share this long-form interview with my holistic health guru and close friend, Dr. Daniel Chille. In this convo we explore the pillars of holistic health and provide a lens for viewing life and optimal performance.

To schedule a 15-minute discovery call with Daniel, please book here: https://calendly.com/alishasumpter/15min

DISCLAIMER: This video is for informational purposes only! Neither Daniel nor myself are clinical MDs. Please consult with your doctor before doing anything.

00:00 Dr. Daniel Chille, Holistic Health, & his SPEND philosophy
10:25 Screenings, Testing, & Personalized Wellness 
27:23 Diet & Microbiome (We Are Being Poisoned!)
1:06:00 Exercise, Nature, & Movement as a Lifestyle
1:37:00 Sleep, Sunlight, & Circadian Biology
1:42:56 Stress & Making Small Changes
1:56:50 1% Improvements & Lightning Round
